Gyproc Gypboard Plain Gypsum Board – 12.5 mm | 1219 × 1829 mm | Tapered Edge
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc Gypboard® Plain is a standard gypsum plasterboard designed for interior walls and ceilings where normal fire, structural, and acoustic performance is required. It features a high-quality aerated gypsum core firmly bonded to durable paper liners, ensuring strength, stability, and a smooth surface finish.







Product Overview

Gyproc Gypboard® Plain is a standard plasterboard suitable for a wide range of dry construction applications. It is manufactured with an aerated gypsum core that is firmly bonded to strong paper liners, providing consistent performance, dimensional stability, and ease of installation.

This board is ideal for internal partitions, wall linings, and ceiling systems where standard fire resistance and acoustic performance are specified.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Standard gypsum board for everyday interior applications
  • Smooth surface suitable for painting, wallpapering, and decorative finishes
  • Compatible with metal framing and drywall systems
  • Reliable fire and acoustic performance under normal conditions
  • Easy cutting, handling, and installation
  • Manufactured as per Indian and international standards

Recommended Applications

  • Internal partition walls
  • Wall linings in residential and commercial buildings
  • False ceilings and soffits
  • Offices, retail spaces, homes, and institutions
  • Areas where normal fire, structural, and acoustic performance is required

Not suitable for high-humidity or damp areas.

Technical Specifications

Parameter Value
Thickness 12.5 mm
Width 1219 mm
Length 1829 mm
Edge Type Tapered (Longitudinal)
Thermal Conductivity (k) 0.16 W/m·K
Ignitability (BS 476 – Part 5) Class P
Surface Spread of Flame (BS 476 – Part 7) Class 1
Flexural Strength – Transverse >180 N
Flexural Strength – Longitudinal >500 N

Product Data Sheet Reference: PB01 – Gypboard® Plain

Standards & Compliance

  • IS 2095 (Part 1): 2011
  • EN 520: 2004

Handling & Storage Guidelines

  • Store boards flat on a level surface
  • Keep in a dry, covered area protected from weather
  • Avoid exposure to temperatures above 49°C
  • Ensure cross-ventilation during storage
  • Handle boards carefully to prevent edge damage

Product Data Sheet Reference: PB01 – Gypboard® Plain

Limitations & Important Notes

  • Not suitable for high-humidity or damp locations
  • Not recommended where condensation risk is high

For bathrooms, kitchens, or wet areas, use moisture-resistant gypsum boards.

What’s Included
  • 1 × Gyproc Gypboard® Plain Gypsum Board (12.5 × 1219 × 1829 mm)

product.title: Gyproc Moisture Resistant Gypsum Board 12.5mm | 1220×1830 mm | TE
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc® Moisture Resistant Board is a specially engineered gypsum plasterboard designed for areas exposed to intermittent moisture. It features an aerated gypsum core with water-repellent additives, firmly bonded to durable paper liners, providing improved resistance to moisture while maintaining strength and surface quality.

Product Overview

Gyproc® Moisture Resistant Board is designed for use in wet and moisture-prone interior areas. The board consists of a gypsum core enhanced with water-repellent additives and encased in strong paper liners, ensuring durability, dimensional stability, and controlled moisture absorption.

This board is ideal for internal partitions, wall linings, and ceilings in areas such as bathrooms and kitchens when used as part of a complete Gyproc system.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Moisture-resistant gypsum board with water-repellent additives
  • Reduced water absorption as per IS 2095 (Part 1): 2023 – Type H1
  • Smooth surface suitable for painting and decorative finishes
  • Compatible with metal framing and drywall systems
  • Provides standard fire and acoustic performance
  • Easy cutting, handling, and installation

Recommended Applications

  • Bathrooms and wash areas (non-direct water exposure)
  • Kitchens and utility areas
  • Moisture-prone internal partition walls
  • Wall linings and ceilings in residential and commercial buildings

Suitable for wet area applications when used with appropriate waterproofing systems.

Technical Specifications

Parameter Value
Thickness 12.5 mm
Width 1220 mm
Length 1830 mm
Edge Type Tapered Edge (Longitudinal)
Thermal Conductivity (k) 0.19 W/m·K
Ignitability (BS 476 – Part 5) Class P
Surface Spread of Flame (BS 476 – Part 7) Class 1
Water Absorption (IS 2095 Part 1:2023) Type H1
Flexural Strength – Transverse >210 N
Flexural Strength – Longitudinal >550 N

Product Data Sheet Reference: PB02 – Gyproc® Moisture Resistant Board

Standards & Compliance

  • IS 2095 (Part 1): 2023 – Type H1
  • EN 520: 2004 – Type A & H1

Handling & Storage Guidelines

  • Store boards flat on a level surface in a covered, dry area
  • Protect from direct exposure to weather and moisture
  • Avoid exposure to temperatures exceeding 49°C
  • Ensure cross-ventilation in storage areas
  • Handle carefully to prevent edge and surface damage

Limitations & Important Notes

  • Not suitable for areas with continuous water contact
  • Not recommended where humidity or dampness is constantly high
  • Condensation may cause mould growth if not addressed at design stage

For areas with direct water exposure, use additional waterproofing systems or specialised boards.

What’s Included

  • 1 × Gyproc® Moisture Resistant Gypsum Board (12.5 × 1220 × 1830 mm)

product.title: Gyproc® Fireline Fire Resistant Gypsum Board 12.5mm | 1220×1830 mm | TE
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc® Fireline Fire Resistant Board is a specially formulated gypsum plasterboard designed to provide enhanced fire resistance for interior wall and ceiling systems. It features a glass fibre reinforced gypsum core bonded to high-quality paper liners, ensuring improved fire performance while maintaining strength and surface finish.

Product Overview

Gyproc® Fireline Board is engineered for applications where increased fire protection is required. The board incorporates glass fibres within the gypsum core, which help maintain structural integrity for a longer period during fire exposure.

This board is suitable for use in partitions, wall linings, and ceiling systems in residential, commercial, and institutional buildings as part of a tested Gyproc drywall system.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Fire-resistant gypsum board with glass fibre reinforcement
  • Enhanced fire protection for critical interior applications
  • Smooth surface suitable for painting and decorative finishes
  • Compatible with metal framing and drywall systems
  • Provides standard acoustic performance
  • Easy to cut, handle, and install

Recommended Applications

  • Fire-rated internal partition walls
  • Fire-resistant wall linings
  • Ceiling systems requiring enhanced fire performance
  • Commercial buildings, offices, hospitals, and institutions
  • Residential projects with fire safety requirements

Fire performance depends on complete system design and installation.

Technical Specifications

Parameter Value
Thickness 12.5 mm
Width 1220 mm
Length 1830 mm
Edge Type Tapered Edge (Longitudinal)
Thermal Conductivity (k) 0.25 W/m·K
Ignitability (BS 476 – Part 5) Class P
Surface Spread of Flame (BS 476 – Part 7) Class 1
Flexural Strength – Transverse >210 N
Flexural Strength – Longitudinal >550 N

Product Data Sheet Reference: PB03 – Gyproc® Fireline Board

Standards & Compliance

  • IS 2095 (Part 1) – Type F
  • EN 520: 2004 – Type DF

Handling & Storage Guidelines

  • Store boards flat on a level surface
  • Keep in a dry, covered area protected from weather
  • Avoid exposure to temperatures above 49°C
  • Ensure adequate ventilation during storage
  • Handle carefully to prevent damage to edges and surface

Limitations & Important Notes

  • Fire resistance depends on the complete system configuration
  • Not suitable for high-humidity or wet areas
  • Improper installation may reduce fire performance

For moisture-prone areas, use moisture-resistant or specialised boards in combination with fire-rated systems.

What’s Included

  • 1 × Gyproc® Fireline Fire Resistant Gypsum Board (12.5 × 1220 × 1830 mm)

product.title: USG Knauf Sheetrock® Standard 12.5mm Gypsum Plasterboard
product.descriptionHtml:
USG Knauf Sheetrock® Standard 12.5mm – Gypsum Plasterboard for Walls & Ceilings

USG Knauf Sheetrock® Standard 12.5mm gypsum plasterboard is designed for standard lightweight drywall construction and high-performance false ceilings. It provides a smooth, uniform surface that is ready for finishing and decoration.

Manufactured with a high-purity gypsum core encased between high tensile paper liners, this plasterboard ensures consistent strength, quality and ease of installation for interior wall and ceiling systems. It meets international and Indian standards, offering reliable performance in a wide range of projects. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

Key Features

  • Thickness: 12.5 mm
  • Product Type: Standard gypsum plasterboard
  • Brand: USG Knauf
  • Material: High-purity gypsum core with paper facings
  • Suitable for wall partitions and false ceilings
  • Consistent quality and strength

Design Advantages

  • Smooth surface ready for finishing and painting
  • Lightweight and easy to handle
  • Enhances seamless ceiling performance

Application Areas

  • Interior wall partitions
  • False ceiling systems
  • Residential buildings
  • Commercial & office interiors

product.title: USG Knauf FireBloc 12.5mm Gypsum Fire-Resistant Plasterboard
product.descriptionHtml:
USG Knauf FireBloc 12.5mm – Fire-Resistant Gypsum Plasterboard

USG Knauf FireBloc 12.5mm gypsum fire-resistant plasterboard is engineered to provide superior fire protection performance in interior wall and ceiling systems. Designed with mineral additives and enhanced gypsum core cohesion, it offers reliable dimensional stability at elevated temperatures. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

The board is suitable for applications where a high level of fire resistance is required, offering tested and certified fire performance for safe and compliant construction. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

Key Features

  • Thickness: 12.5 mm
  • Product Type: Fire-Resistant gypsum plasterboard
  • Fire Performance: Suitable for fire protection from 60 to 240 minutes
  • Colour: Pink fire-resistant paper liners
  • Brand: USG Knauf
  • Edge Type: Tapered Edge (TE)

Design Advantages

  • Enhanced fire protection for interior systems
  • Low expansion and shrinkage with climate change
  • High surface quality for finishing
  • Dry and easy installation

Application Areas

  • Drywall partitions in fire-rated spaces
  • Shaft walls requiring fire protection
  • Ceiling fire-rated assemblies
  • Commercial and residential interiors needing fire resistance

product.title: Knauf MoistBloc Plasterboard 1220×1830×12.5 mm TE
product.descriptionHtml:
Knauf MoistBloc 12.5mm – Moisture-Resistant Gypsum Plasterboard

Knauf MoistBloc 12.5mm plasterboard is specially developed for interior wall and ceiling systems exposed to humidity and moisture. It is widely used in bathrooms, kitchens and other wet sections of residential and commercial buildings.

Manufactured with a specially treated gypsum core and green paper liners, the board offers enhanced resistance to moisture and supports tile installations, making it a reliable solution for humid environments.

Key Features

  • Size: 1220 × 1830 mm
  • Thickness: 12.5 mm
  • Edge Type: Tapered Edge (TE)
  • Product Type: Moisture-resistant gypsum plasterboard
  • Brand: Knauf
  • Water absorption: Less than 5%
  • Suitable base for ceramic tiles

Design Advantages

  • Resists extensive moisture and humidity
  • Improves durability in damp interior environments
  • Provides smooth surface for finishing and tiling
  • Supports long-term performance in wet areas

Application Areas

  • Bathrooms and kitchens
  • False ceilings in humid interiors
  • Interior drywall partitions
  • Hotels, hospitals and commercial interiors

product.title: Gyproc Duraline Board 13mm – High Impact Resistant Gypsum Plasterboard
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc Duraline Board 13mm – High Impact Resistant Gypsum Plasterboard

The Gyproc Duraline Board is a high-performance gypsum plasterboard designed specifically for interior wall applications where durability against impact and high traffic use is required. Manufactured by Gyproc — part of the Saint-Gobain group — this board features a reinforced gypsum core incorporating glass Fibers, all enclosed between strong mustard-yellow coloured paper liners. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

Unlike standard gypsum boards, the Gyproc Duraline Board is engineered to deliver superior resistance to wear, accidental impacts, and repeated human or material interaction. Due to its robust core and enhanced material composition, it performs exceptionally well in areas exposed to heavy use, such as hospitals, schools, corridors, industrial facilities, commercial interiors, and public spaces. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

Key Features:

  • High Impact Resistance: Designed to withstand heavy knocks and daily wear for longer service life. :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}
  • Strong Gypsum Core: Reinforced with glass Fibers for added structural stability. :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}
  • Sound Insulation: Offers improved acoustic performance compared to standard boards. :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}
  • Standard Board Dimensions: Typically available in 1219mm width and 2438mm length with 13mm thickness. :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6}
  • EN 520 Compliant: Manufactured to international gypsum board standards for quality and performance. :contentReference[oaicite:7]{index=7}

Applications:

  • Interior partition walls
  • High-traffic corridors and hallways
  • Hospitals and healthcare facilities
  • Commercial offices and retail spaces
  • Educational institutes and public buildings
  • Any wall requiring enhanced impact resistance

The Gyproc Duraline Board delivers a durable, reliable, and high-quality surface that stands up to everyday challenges. Whether used in new construction or renovation, it provides a robust solution for interior wall systems requiring long-lasting performance. :contentReference[oaicite:8]{index=8}

product.title: Gyproc Habito Board 12.5 mm – High Strength Gypsum Plasterboard
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc Habito Board 12.5 mm – High Strength Gypsum Plasterboard

The Gyproc Habito Board is a revolutionary gypsum plasterboard specially engineered to deliver superior strength, durability, and fixability for modern interior wall and partition systems. Manufactured by Gyproc, part of the Saint-Gobain Group — a global leader in building materials — this high performance board offers unmatched flexibility for fixing heavy fixtures without additional support plates or anchor systems. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}

Featuring a robust 12.5 mm thickness and a high-strength engineered core reinforced with glass Fibers and additives, the Habito Board provides enhanced structural stability, impact resistance, and acoustic performance. Its design eliminates many limitations of traditional gypsum boards, making it ideal for both residential and commercial applications where strong fixings and long-lasting walls are needed. :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

Key Features:

  • High strength engineered gypsum core that improves load-bearing capacity. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}
  • Direct loading up to ∼15 kg on a single standard No.10 wood screw without requiring wall anchors or special fixings. :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}
  • Superior impact resistance compared to standard plasterboards. :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}
  • Good acoustic insulation properties for quieter interiors. :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}
  • Easy fixability for heavy items like shelves, TVs, cabinets, and curtain rods. :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6}
  • Smooth, paint-ready surface suitable for finishing, painting, or wallpapering. :contentReference[oaicite:7]{index=7}
  • Complies with international gypsum board standards. :contentReference[oaicite:8]{index=8}

Applications:

  • Interior walls and partitions
  • Living rooms, bedrooms, and common interior spaces
  • Commercial offices, retail interiors, hospitality sectors
  • Healthcare, educational and institutional interiors
  • Areas requiring strong load-bearing drywall solutions
  • Supports long-term performance in wet areas
  • Areas requiring strong load-bearing drywall solutions
  • Supports long-term performance in wet areas

The Gyproc Habito Board stands out as a versatile and robust interior lining solution — giving contractors, designers, and homeowners the freedom to fix heavy objects directly to walls without traditional limitations. Its superior strength, durability, and finish quality make it ideal for contemporary construction and renovation projects. :contentReference[oaicite:9]{index=9}

product.title: Gyproc Glasroc H Board 12.5 mm – Water & Mold-Resistant Gypsum Plasterboard
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc Glasroc H Board 12.5 mm – Water & Mold-Resistant Gypsum Plasterboard

The Gyproc Glasroc H Board is an advanced gypsum plasterboard engineered for environments exposed to moisture, humidity, and wet-area conditions. Manufactured using Enhanced Glass Reinforced Gypsum (eGRG) technology, this board features a reinforced gypsum core encased in hydrophobic treated glass mat liners that deliver excellent water resistance, low water absorption, and superior mold resistance. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

Unlike standard gypsum boards, Glasroc H retains structural integrity even in damp conditions and provides a reliable substrate for tile, marble, or granite finishes without the need for traditional waterproofing layers. With low total water absorption (< 5 %) and surface water absorption performance, it offers exceptional durability in areas like bathrooms, kitchens, indoor pool ceilings, and corridors. :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3}

Key Features:

  • Water-resistant gypsum board: Special hydrophobic glass mat liners reduce water ingress and enhance durability in wet environments. :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}
  • Mold resistance: Core contains biocides and glass-mat construction scores 10 on ASTM D3273 for best mold resistance. :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}
  • Strong backing for heavy finishes: Supports heavy tiling, marble, or granite up to 60 kg/m² with the right adhesive. :contentReference[oaicite:6]{index=6}
  • Dimensional stability: Maintains strength and flatness even under moisture exposure. :contentReference[oaicite:7]{index=7}
  • Dual surface design: Blue pre-primed glass mat exterior and white glass mat interior for superior finishing. :contentReference[oaicite:8]{index=8}
  • Fast and easy installation: Lighter than cement boards with easier cutting and fixing installation. :contentReference[oaicite:9]{index=9}

Applications:

  • Wet and moisture-prone interior walls and ceilings
  • Bathrooms, shower enclosures, and kitchens
  • Indoor swimming pool ceilings
  • Heavy cladding backing with tiles or stone finishes
  • Commercial and residential wet-area partitions

Gyproc Glasroc H Board is ideal for applications where water resistance and long-term performance are critical. Its engineered gypsum core and glass mat reinforcement create a robust yet lightweight board that outperforms standard gypsum boards in moisture-rich environments. :contentReference[oaicite:10]{index=10}
